fixtures.name: synthetic-a1-tree
fixtures.description: A pure spanning-tree wikilink graph with no undirected cycles.

fixtures.name: synthetic-a2-cycle
fixtures.description: A single core cycle with tree attachments, forcing arboricity 2.

fixtures.name: synthetic-k5-core
fixtures.description: A K5 clique core plus trees. Exact clique arboricity is 3; the sweep records BF-192's greedy upper bound.

fixtures.name: synthetic-k9-core
fixtures.description: A K9 clique core plus trees. Exact clique arboricity is 5; the sweep records BF-192's greedy upper bound.

fixtures.name: synthetic-k15-core
fixtures.description: A K15 clique core plus trees. Exact clique arboricity is 8; the sweep records BF-192's greedy upper bound.
